Class ModularJavaDLStrategyFactory

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.ModularJavaDLStrategyFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
StrategyFactory, Named
public class ModularJavaDLStrategyFactory extends Object implements StrategyFactory
Creates a ModularJavaDLStrategy and handles strategy settings relevant to it.
